captures.notes: Capture the modal opening with the visible tab order `Help`, `Unified History`, and `AI Overview`.
Capture the stats row, filters, search, and dense history rows in the default `Unified History` view.
Capture the detail modal proving the timeline is actionable and can route back to the originating session.
Capture the cold-open or generating state so the synopsis feels grounded in actual history processing.
Capture the ready synopsis with lookback, `Regenerate`, `Save`, and `Copy` controls visible.
Represent the link between history-file evidence and the generated synopsis so the summary is framed as grounded, not freeform.

assets.label: Director Notes modal shell capture
assets.usage: Scene 1 modal-open proof and reusable shell for later scenes.

assets.label: Unified History controls capture
assets.usage: Scenes 2 and 3 evidence-first browsing and actionability beats.

assets.label: History detail modal capture
assets.usage: Scene 3 proof that the timeline can route back into the source session.

assets.label: AI Overview ready capture
assets.usage: Scenes 5 and 6 synopsis-ready proof and closing comparison beat.

assets.label: Grounded synthesis overlay
assets.usage: Scene 6 overlay connecting the timeline evidence to the generated summary.

sceneMappings.purpose: Frame fragmented agent oversight as a real operational burden before the feature resolves it.

cropPlan.framing: Use the authored 1920x1080 master frame for capture logging and trims.
cropPlan.safeZone: Keep the full master frame available so later trims can derive square and vertical crops without re-recording.

cropPlan.framing: Center the stats row, filter pills, and synopsis header while using tighter crops for long timeline rows or markdown paragraphs.
cropPlan.safeZone: Keep `Unified History`, `AI Overview`, and the key control strip inside the middle crop so the story still reads without peripheral list density.

cropPlan.framing: Stack the history controls and synopsis header as vertical story beats, using list rows and markdown blocks as guided inserts instead of full-width panels.
cropPlan.safeZone: Protect tab labels, control buttons, and the active summary section in a tall central column with animated transitions between evidence and synthesis.

sources.notes: Source type: screenshot fallback. Resolved from the checked-in Unified History screenshot copied into capture/docs/director-notes/unified-history-reference.png because it already shows the modal shell and tab strip. A safe live attempt succeeded via `pnpm dev:demo` on 2026-03-10, but the fresh demo profile did not expose seeded feature data rich enough for autonomous end-to-end capture.
